About Us

Gonawila's Most Trusted Brick Manufacturer

Munasinghe Brick Solutions has been serving builders, contractors, and homeowners across Sri Lanka for over a decade. Our bricks are kiln-fired from high-quality clay, ensuring strength and durability for every construction project.

Kiln-fired quality
Consistent sizing
Bulk orders welcome
Fast delivery
Competitive pricing
Expert guidance

Our Products

Premium Bricks for Every Need

From standard wall bricks to special sizes, we manufacture to meet your project requirements.

2×4×9 Engineer Bricks

High-strength engineer bricks ideal for load-bearing walls, pillars, and foundations. Uniform size, superior compressive strength.

Engineer Grade
3×5×8 Bricks

Versatile medium-sized bricks suited for residential walls, partition walls, and general construction. Excellent finish and consistency.

Most Popular
3×6×9 Bricks

Our largest standard brick — perfect for thick walls, retaining walls, and large-scale construction projects requiring extra durability.

Heavy Duty

Why Choose Us

Quality You Can Build On

High-Temperature Kiln Firing

Each brick is fired at optimal temperatures to achieve maximum hardness, low water absorption, and long-lasting durability.

Consistent Dimensions

Our manufacturing process ensures uniform brick sizes, making construction faster and reducing mortar waste.

Reliable Delivery

We deliver across the North Western Province and beyond. On-time delivery keeps your project on schedule.

15+ Years of Trust

Thousands of homeowners, contractors, and developers in Sri Lanka rely on Munasinghe Brick Solutions.
